regression_mechanism: E_49152_32_3 is beneficial cache-warming: copies V to L2-warm buffer before flash_partial reads it. Without the copy, flash_partial reads cold V from persistent KV cache (MAXC=4608, ~9.4MB V buffer), increasing HBM latency. The copy cost (6.69% GPU) is more than offset by improved flash_partial V read latency.
reopen_condition: LDS-staged flash_partial_coop_vec that prefetches V into on-chip shared memory per workgroup. Would achieve equivalent cache-warming without the global copy. Requires LDS allocation in the tinygrad emitter (PRIMITIVE_MISSING for LDS-alloc UOp).
